query: If a single response team can inspect 3 severely damaged sites per day, estimate how many days one team would need to cover all severely damaged buildings in this area.

input.text: How many severely damaged buildings (major-damage and destroyed) in the post-disaster image.

final_answer: One team would need **2 days** to inspect all severely damaged buildings.

evaluation.question: Are exactly 2 days stated as the required inspection time in the response?
